creator: Christopher.petrik@usm.edu
text: Tried that didn’t work, so modifying the port to work with 2.x removing the features 3.x is the solution than to just use the included version which is the same version as the latest 3.x explain the logic cause I’m getting sick and tired of this this port has been a constant issue for years now and no one take accountability to help fix when I tried I was ignored , I tested 3.x and was Willy g to fix and latch and again I was ignored so if I’m going to maintain it it’s got g to be included 3.x simple as that also don’t be rude if someone else was already working on it.
